Sandbox_IKappaIDOmniPacking_WeightReduct: How much lighter packed materials are (planks, nails, ore, and similar). At 50%, a bundle weighs half what the loose items would. You cannot pack a bundle inside another bundle.
Sandbox_IKappaIDOmniPacking_SkillBookWei: Weight reduction for one bundle that holds all five skill books (levels 1 through 5) for a skill. Can be different from materials.
Sandbox_IKappaIDOmniPacking_LiteratureWe: Weight reduction when packing magazines, newspapers, books, comics, and other reading items.
Sandbox_IKappaIDOmniPacking_FoodWeightRe: Weight reduction for packed food bundles (flour, rice, snacks, canned goods, and similar). Unpacking gives fresh loose items.
Sandbox_IKappaIDOmniPacking_HeavyItemExt: Added on top of material reduction when each single item is very heavy (logs, ore, anvils, generators). Total reduction from both settings cannot go above 90%.
Sandbox_IKappaIDOmniPacking_HeavyItemWei: If one loose item weighs this much or more, it qualifies for the extra heavy-item reduction. Default is 10 kg.
Sandbox_IKappaIDOmniPacking_MinimumBundl: After reduction, bundles never weigh less than this. Keep low for seeds and small scrap; raise if you want to limit very light bundles.
Sandbox_IKappaIDOmniPacking_PackTimeMult: 100 is normal speed. 50 is twice as fast. 200 is twice as slow. Applies when you load the game or change these settings.
Sandbox_IKappaIDOmniPacking_UnpackTimeMu: 100 is normal speed. 50 is twice as fast. 200 is twice as slow. Applies when you load the game or change these settings.
Sandbox_IKappaIDOmniPacking_EnableMateri: Turn off to remove pack and unpack recipes for material bundles. Bundles you already have stay in the world.
Sandbox_IKappaIDOmniPacking_EnableSkillB: Turn off to remove recipes that bundle all five books for one skill into a single item.
Sandbox_IKappaIDOmniPacking_EnableFoodPa: Turn off to remove pack and unpack recipes for food bundles. Shelf-stable dry goods, snacks, spices, and sealed cans only.
Sandbox_IKappaIDOmniPacking_EnableStackT: Show pack and unpack recipes that combine 5 loose items into one bundle.
Show pack and unpack recipes that combine 10 loose items into one bundle.
Show pack and unpack recipes that combine 25 loose items into one bundle.
Show pack and unpack recipes that combine 50 loose items into one bundle.
Show pack and unpack recipes that combine 100 loose items into one bundle.
Sandbox_IKappaIDOmniPacking_RefreshBundl: Update existing bundles when settings change
When on, bundles already in inventories get new weights after you change options here (may take a couple of seconds). Turn off if only new bundles should use new settings.
Sandbox_IKappaIDOmniPacking_SortPackingM: Sort pack menu by bundle size
When on, right-click pack recipes are listed in order: x5, then x10, x25, x50, x100.
